'''Yang Wood Monkey''' is the 21st of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 甲 Kinoe (yang wood, the gaia-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 申 Saru, the [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's metal overcomes the stem's wood, the lower restraining the high.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Water Goat]] (node 20) and [[Yin Wood Rooster]] (node 22).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoe (甲)]] — yang wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Monkey (zodiac)|Monkey (申)]] — yang metal
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Water Goat]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Wood Rooster]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062011}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
